servinfo.title: A/C Refrigerant Pressure Sensor Removal and Installation

attention2.ptxt: When tightening or loosening a fitting, use two wrenches, one for turning and the other for support.

s1.ptxt: Recover refrigerant from the A/C system using recovery and recycling equipment referring to “Recovery” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .
Disconnect A/C refrigerant pressure sensor connector.
Remove A/C refrigerant pressure sensor (1) from liquid pipe (2).

servinfosub.title: Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: A/C Refrigerant Pressure Sensor and Its Circuit Inspection:Manual Type

servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Apply compressor oil to new O-ring of A/C refrigerant pressure sensor.
Tighten A/C refrigerant pressure sensor to specified torque.
Evacuate and charge A/C system referring to “Evacuation” and “Charge” in Operation Procedure for Refrigerant Charge:Manual Type .
